places.name: Bouillon Chartier
places.description:
Iconic 19th century workers' canteen! French classics at unbeatable prices. Always packed, come early!
Bouillon République is maybe a bit less crowded :)

places.name: 🌱 L'As du Fallafel
places.description: The most famous falafel in Paris, on Rue des Rosiers. Eat standing outside or in the small parc behind.

places.name: Marché des Enfants Rouges
places.description: Paris's oldest covered market, now a food court. Japanese, Moroccan, French... all excellent.

places.name: 🌱 Le Potager de Charlotte
places.description: Vegetarian gastronomy. Elaborate and affordable food, great for lunch.

places.name: Dong Huong
places.description: Favourite Vietnamese restaurant in Paris. Many other around the area, not fancy but great food.

places.name: Rue d'Aligre
places.description: Lively local street market with many great food spots, including Le Charolais, Do et Riz, and La Ruche à Miel.

places.name: 🌱 Pistil
places.description: Entrée, plat, dessert menu at €19. Classic vegan and vegetarian food.

places.name: Restaurant Virtus
places.description: Creative gastronomic restaurant with tasting menus and a very good wine selection. Trendy and refined, but a bit more expensive.

places.name: Soé
places.description: French and Japanese fusion restaurant around €50. Creative, balanced, and very pleasant.

places.name: Le Procope
places.description: The oldest café in Paris. Classic French food in a beautiful historic setting.

places.name: Oberkampf area
places.description: The best neighbourhood to party like a Parisian. Dozens of bars within 5 minutes walk of each other.

places.name: Canal Saint-Martin
places.description: Not one bar but an entire area. Grab a drink from any off-licence and sit by the canal in summer time.

places.name: Caveau de la Huchette
places.description: The most famous and touristic jazz bar in Paris, in a 13th-century cave. Go early early early to get a spot. Lively place if you succeed to get in!

places.name: Le Baiser Salé / Sunset-sunside / Duc des lombards
places.description: Jazz clubs in Châtelet with live music almost every night. Less crowded than Caveau de la Huchette.

places.name: Le Repaire Charonne RPR
places.description: Small bar with many foreigners. Karaoke on Sunday and Wednesday. Ask for Prince :)

places.name: Grand Mosque of Paris
places.description: Mint tea, pastries, and tiled courtyards in a 1920s mosque. One of the most surprising spots in Paris.

places.name: Café de Flore
places.description: Sartre, Beauvoir, and half of 20th-century French philosophy were regulars here. Overpriced but a genuine institution.

places.name: Café de la Paix
places.description: Grand Haussmann-era café on the Opera square.

places.name: 🌱 Muniyandi Vilas
places.description: Indian street food. Cheap and fully vegetarian.

places.name: 🌱 Les Délices de Tunisie
places.description: Tunisian food with great vegetarian options.

places.name: Rendez Vous Chocolat
places.description: Very good chocolate shop. Everything is made on the spot :)

places.name: Pharmacie Monge Notre Dame
places.description: Famous pharmacy with many products and good prices. French pharamacy are great, any would do the job!
